sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n67121" key="metepide/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μετεπι-δέω</orth>, <sense id="n67121.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">readjust a bandage</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0627.tlg009.perseus-grc1:26" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">26</biblScope></bibl>, al.</sense> </entryFree>
